_README: TEMPLATE for plugin install config. Plugin marketplace URLs and slugs below are PLACEHOLDERS — verify each against the plugin's homepage before use. The reliable path is the CLI commands in STACK_SETUP.md; this file documents the equivalent settings.json shape. Merge the verified parts into your project's .claude/settings.json (committed) — NOT settings.local.json (machine-local).

enabledPlugins._note: Format is usually "<plugin>@<marketplace>": true. Confirm each plugin's marketplace and slug.

_skill_equivalents_already_native: claude-skills (263+ marketplace) -> use anthropic_skills/find-skills to discover + install on demand
